name: Employee Onboarding
description: Onboard a new employee from offer acceptance to first-day readiness.

steps.name: Provision email
steps.description: Create the company mailbox and aliases.

steps.name: Assign laptop
steps.description: Image and ship a laptop to the new hire.

steps.name: Set up payroll
steps.description: Register the employee in the payroll system.

steps.name: Schedule welcome meeting
steps.description: Book the first-day welcome and orientation session.
